description: Delete candidate's CV. Endpoint: DELETE /c/{company_id}/candidates/{id}/delete_cv. Required parameters: id, company_id. Optional parameters include delete_parsed_data.

params.name: delete_parsed_data
params.description: Delete data previously extracted from CV file (should be string ‘true’ or ‘1’)

example_request:
DELETE /c/{company_id}/candidates/{id}/delete_cv

Required params: id, company_id

Optional params: delete_parsed_data
